title: 151 Diy Plasterboard White Strong Mesh Tape, 20 Metre Roll
features: PERFECT FINISH: 151 Plasterboard Tape, easily apply the white mesh tape to hold plasterboard sheets, reducing movement ready to plaster over for a smooth finish. Use for other home repairs.
FILL THE GAP: 151 Plasterboard Tape, apply to prevent plaster moving into gaps between plasterboards. Textured to allow plaster or filler to attach easily to the tape ensuring a smooth perfect finish

QUICK REPAIRS: 151 Plasterboard Tape, cut to fit any DIY repair job. Repair damaged walls and ceilings, apply over stress cracks, small holes and fill. Always ensure the area is dry and dust free before applying.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use roll of plasterboard tape 20m x 48mm x 0.25mm
description: From the manufacturer Perfect Finish 151 Plasterboard Tape, easily apply the white mesh tape to hold plasterboard sheets, reducing movement ready to plaster over for a smooth finish .
